questions.prompt: Select the group which contains only pure metals.
questions.explanation: Steel, brass and nichrome are alloys (mixtures), so only Copper, Iron and Gold are pure metals.

questions.prompt: Antibiotics are an effective treatment for illnesses caused by viruses.
questions.explanation: Antibiotics work on bacteria and fungi, not viruses.

questions.prompt: Name the straw-coloured liquid part of blood.
questions.explanation: Plasma carries the blood cells, nutrients and wastes.

questions.prompt: A camel has wide, flat feet. Explain why this stops it sinking into soft sand.
questions.modelAnswer: The camel's weight stays the same, but its wide feet spread that weight over a larger contact area. Since pressure = force / area, a larger area means less pressure on the sand, so it does not sink.
points: Notes the weight (force) stays the same
Explains the wide feet increase the contact area
Concludes the larger area lowers the pressure
